layout_rules.horizontal_scroll: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory no-scrollbar -mx-6 px-6 gap-4

changes: CHANGE alignment of text container from 'items-end' to 'items-center justify-center' on mobile (h-full).
UPDATE Gradient Overlay: Increase opacity for readability. Use 'from-black via-black/70 to-black/30'.
REFACTOR Buttons: Change from 'flex-col' to 'grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 w-full'. Primary CTA spans full width if needed, or split 50/50.
TYPOGRAPHY: Ensure H1 is text-center. Add 'drop-shadow-lg' to text.
REMOVE: 'hidden sm:block' from View Projects button if client wants it, otherwise keep it hidden to reduce clutter.
LAYOUT: Keep 'SwipeCarousel' but ensure cards are 'h-[280px]' instead of 'h-[340px]' to reduce vertical space.
CARD DESIGN: Add 'text-center' to card content wrapper.
READABILITY: Change image overlay to 'bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/90 to-transparent' (Stronger bottom).
TEXT: Center the icon, subtitle, title, and description.
NAVIGATION: Ensure swipe indicators (dots) are visible and gold.
CRITICAL: Convert vertical stack of cards to Horizontal Scroll (Snap) on mobile.
WRAPPER: Change mobile container to 'flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-4 px-6 -mx-6 pb-4'.
ITEM: Add 'min-w-[85vw] snap-center' to each tool card.
FEATURED CARD: Reduce padding on mobile ('p-6' instead of 'p-8'). Center align text.
REMOVE: 'grid-cols-1' on mobile wrapper.
CRITICAL: Fix Hover State. Remove 'opacity-0 translate-y-4' on mobile. Text must be permanently visible.
CLASS CHANGE: 'opacity-0' -> 'opacity-100 lg:opacity-0'. 'translate-y-4' -> 'translate-y-0 lg:translate-y-4'.
LAYOUT: Convert Grid to Horizontal Scroll. Container: 'flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-4 px-6 -mx-6'.
ITEM: 'min-w-[80vw] snap-center h-[260px]'.
OVERLAY: Ensure 'bg-black/60' is always present on mobile for text readability.

GlobalNavigation.MobileTabBar: Ensure z-index is 50. Background must be 'bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl' (High quality glass).
GlobalNavigation.FAB: Position FABs at 'bottom-24 right-6' to clear the tab bar.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use pure transparent backgrounds on text overlays.
CENTER align all headings and hero content on mobile.
USE 'snap-x' and 'overflow-x-auto' for any list > 2 items on mobile.
ENSURE 44px minimum touch targets for all buttons.
